text.title: OKR Cascade for Multi-Squad Product Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Quarterly cascade with explicit identity-squad dependency
example.code: quarter: 2026-Q2 company_okrs: - id: co-1 objective: Activation rate doubles krs: [co-kr-1: D7 25% -> 45%] squads: - id: s-checkout objective: Remove top-3 checkout friction krs: - {id: kr-1, metric: checkout_completion_rate, baseline: 0.62, target: 0.78} - {id: kr-2, metric: d7_activation, baseline: 0.21, target: 0.40} - {id: kr-3, metric: error_rate, baseline: 0.012, target: 0.005} trace_to_company: [co-kr-1] dependency_edges: - {producer: s-identity, consumer: s-checkout, deliverable: SSO bypass API, by_date: 2026-05-15} checkin_cadence: weekly

example.title: Implicit dependencies and untraced KRs
example.code: quarter: Q2 company_okrs: [] squads: - id: s1 objective: ok krs: [{id: k1}] dependency_edges: [{producer: x}] checkin_cadence: ad-hoc
